title: Senior Software Engineer - Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
